steps: Dissolve all salts and other ingredients in 1l of distilled water: KN2PO4 1g KNO3 1g MgSO4-7H2O 0.5g KCl 0.5g Glucose 0.2g Sucrose 0.5g
Bring pH to about 5.5 using approx. 600 µl NaOH
creator: Remco Stam
